title: AN ACT INCREASING THE HILLTOP RIZAL PHILIPPINE NATIONAL POLICE (PNP) COMMAND IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TAYTAY, PROVINCE OF RIZAL AS CAMP GENERAL LICERIO GERONIMO

chunks.text:
115 OG No. 25, 6055 (June 24, 2019)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 11296, April 17, 2019 ]

AN ACT INCREASING THE HILLTOP RIZAL PHILIPPINE NATIONAL POLICE (PNP) COMMAND IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TAYTAY, PROVINCE OF RIZAL AS CAMP GENERAL LICERIO GERONIMO

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Hilltop Rizal Philippine National Police (PNP) Command in the Municipality of Taytay, Province of Rizal is hereby renamed as Camp General Licerio Geronimo.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(SGD.)

VICENTE C. SOTTO III

President of the Senate

(SGD.)

GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate of the Philippines on May 2, 2017 and February 4, 2019, respectively.

(SGD.)

MYRA MARIE D. VILLARICA

Secretary of the Senate

(SGD.)

DANTE ROBERTO P. MALING

Acting Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: APR 17 2019

(SGD.)

RODRIGO ROA DUTERTE

President of the Philippines
